nasb.text: “Then the tent of meeting shall set out with the camp of the Levites in the midst of the camps; just as they camp, so they shall set out, every man in his place by their standards.

esv.text: “Then the tent of meeting shall set out, with the camp of the Levites in the midst of the camps; as they camp, so shall they set out, each in position, standard by standard.

cnv.text: “會幕和利未人的營要在眾營中間前行；他們怎樣安營，就怎樣出發前行；各按本位，各歸本旗。

ccb.text: 随后是会幕和利未人的营区，在其他各营中间。他们各就各位，各归本旗，照安营时的次序出发。
